SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.spi

Class DefaultORMConverterImpl<D,E>

java.lang.Object
st.orm.core.spi.DefaultORMConverterImpl<D,E>
Type Parameters:
D -
E -
All Implemented Interfaces:
ORMConverter
public final class DefaultORMConverterImpl<D,E> extends Object implements ORMConverter
Since:
1.7

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultORMConverterImpl

      public DefaultORMConverterImpl(@Nonnull RecordField field, @Nonnull Converter<D,E> converter, @Nonnull Class<D> databaseType)
      Parameters:
      field - the record field this converter is bound to.
      converter - the value converter (object to database).
      databaseType - the JDBC-facing / database column Java type (D).

  • Method Details

    • getParameterCount

      public int getParameterCount()
      Returns the number of parameters in the SQL template.

      Note: The count must match the parameter as returned by getParameterTypes().

      Specified by:
      getParameterCount in interface ORMConverter
      Returns:
      the number of parameters.

    • getParameterTypes

      public List<Class<?>> getParameterTypes() throws SqlTemplateException
      Returns the types of the parameters in the SQL template.
      Specified by:
      getParameterTypes in interface ORMConverter
      Returns:
      a list of parameter types.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException

    • getColumns

      public List<Name> getColumns(@Nonnull ORMConverter.NameResolver nameResolver) throws SqlTemplateException
      Returns the names of the columns that will be used in the SQL template.

      Note: The names must match the parameters as returned by getParameterTypes().

      Specified by:
      getColumns in interface ORMConverter
      Returns:
      a list of column names.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException

    • toDatabase

      public List<Object> toDatabase(@Nullable Object record) throws SqlTemplateException
      Converts the given record to a list of values that can be used in the SQL template.

      Note: The values must match the parameters as returned by getParameterTypes().

      Specified by:
      toDatabase in interface ORMConverter
      Parameters:
      record - the record to convert.
      Returns:
      the values to be used in the SQL template.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException

    • fromDatabase

      public Object fromDatabase(@Nonnull Object[] values, @Nonnull RefFactory refFactory) throws SqlTemplateException
      Converts the given values to an object that is used in the object model.
      Specified by:
      fromDatabase in interface ORMConverter
      Parameters:
      values - the arguments to convert. The arguments match the parameter types as returned by getParameterTypes().
      refFactory - the factory for creating references to entities (unused here, but part of the SPI).
      Returns:
      the converted object.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException - if an error occurs during conversion.
